title: Login page error
description: User cannot login despite correct credentials, system shows invalid password message and prevents access to dashboard page.

title: Payment gateway issue
description: Customer completed payment successfully but order not confirmed, transaction amount deducted and no confirmation email received yet.

title: Profile update bug
description: User attempts to update profile picture but upload fails repeatedly without error message or any notification displayed.

title: Slow website loading
description: Homepage loads very slowly during peak hours, causing frustration and multiple refresh attempts from users frequently.

title: Forgot password
description: User requested password reset link but did not receive email after multiple attempts from system.

title: Cart not updating
description: Items added to cart disappear automatically after refreshing page or navigating to another section.

title: Order confirmation delay
description: Customer placed order successfully but confirmation message and email notification delayed significantly causing confusion.

title: Search function not working
description: Search feature returns empty results even when valid product names are entered correctly by users.

title: Mobile layout issue
description: Website layout breaks on smaller screens, overlapping text and images reduce usability significantly.

title: Coupon code invalid
description: Valid promotional coupon code shows invalid error message during checkout process unexpectedly.
